name: Jax the Seeker
lines: It's hell out there. Are you ready?

friendly.greeting: Hey, you're still alive? I've scouted out a pretty decent route this time.
friendly.farewell: Don't die. If you're gone, I won't have anyone to drink with.

normal.greeting: What is it? Move, you're in the way.
normal.farewell: Good luck. Sometimes that's the only weapon you've got.

hostile.farewell: Disappear from my sight. Next time, my blade will do the talking.

deathLine: Jax collapses, losing his grip on the map he was holding.
description: An expert scout who seems somewhat out of place.

dialogues: A man in grease-stained rags emerges from the shadows, fiddling with a worn dagger.
Jax: "Hey, ain't seen your face 'round here. Not even a rat passes through without my say-so."
Jax: "Lookin' all scrawny... You're lookin' like subway rat fodder to me. Heh."
Jax: "But lucky for you, I'm 'roundin' up some heads lately. I could take ya to the HQ, how 'bout it?"
(You observe Jax's protruding collarbones and sturdy-looking skeletal frame.)
Necromancer (Monologue): 'A pathetic appearance, but the bone structure is superb. If I kill and raise him, he’d make a fine assault soldier...'
join.select_title: How will you respond to Jax's fishy proposal?
join.result_join: Jax: "Heh, so ya wanna live after all? Wise move. I'll put in a good word at HQ. Follow me!"
join.confirm_move: Will you follow Jax to the Resistance HQ immediately?
join.stay_msg: Jax: "What, ya still got business left?"
join.result_kill_jax: Jax: "What? What's with that look? How dare you... to the great Jax!"
join.result_kill_player: Necromancer: "Don't worry. In death, you shall become far more useful than you are now."
join.result_leave: Jax: "Hmph, look at ya running away in fear! Don't let me see your face again!"

enter.log: Jax: "Alright, quit dawdlin' and stay close. The path here is a bit tricky."
